packs.name: Neoclassical
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre reads as the gold accent, Umber as engraved text/rule lines.
packs.surfaceTreatment: matte ivory surfaces, hairline gold rules, high symmetry, generous margins
packs.accessibilityNote: Keep serif body ≥16px; gold (Ochre) only as accent, never body text on light.

packs.name: Baroque
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as gold-leaf ornament, Umber as deep shadow ground.
packs.surfaceTreatment: dramatic layered shadows, ornamental frames, high-contrast panels
packs.accessibilityNote: Ornament must be decorative-only (aria-hidden); maintain APCA Lc≥75 on text.

packs.name: Aurora
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre seeds the warm end of iridescent gradients; Umber anchors text.
packs.surfaceTreatment: soft animated gradients, low-blur translucency, glow accents
packs.accessibilityNote: Text sits on a solid scrim, never directly on a moving gradient; honor prefers-reduced-motion.

packs.name: Ethereal
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Tinted Ochre/Umber washes only; brand stays the anchor of any solid element.
packs.surfaceTreatment: airy whitespace, feathered shadows, low-chroma tints
packs.accessibilityNote: Low-contrast is decorative; all functional text must still hit APCA Lc≥75.

packs.name: Filigree
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as metallic linework, Umber as substrate.
packs.surfaceTreatment: fine line ornament, lace dividers, monogram lockups
packs.accessibilityNote: Linework is decorative; keep stroke ≥1.5px for legibility, not a UI control.

packs.name: Acanthus
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre/Umber foliage motifs; greens used only as illustration accents.
packs.surfaceTreatment: carved foliate borders, symmetric vine dividers
packs.accessibilityNote: Botanical ornament decorative-only.

packs.name: Anthropomorphic
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre for friendly fills, Umber for outlines/features.
packs.surfaceTreatment: rounded shapes, character mascots, playful micro-motion
packs.accessibilityNote: Mascots are imagery; provide alt text; do not rely on character alone to convey state.

packs.name: Pixel Art
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Quantize Umber/Ochre into a limited indexed palette.
packs.surfaceTreatment: hard pixel edges, image-rendering: pixelated, stepped shadows
packs.accessibilityNote: Pixel type is hard to read small; use only for display, pair with a legible UI font for body.

packs.name: Sketch
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Umber as ink, Ochre as highlighter accent.
packs.surfaceTreatment: hand-drawn borders, sketch fills, paper grain background
packs.accessibilityNote: Hand-drawn strokes must not reduce control contrast; keep focus rings crisp.

packs.name: Luxury Typography
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as foil accent on Umber/ivory; type carries identity.
packs.surfaceTreatment: expansive whitespace, large tracked serifs, minimal chrome
packs.accessibilityNote: Large tracking only on display; keep body tracking normal for readability.

packs.name: Japandi
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Soften with warm neutrals; Ochre as a single restrained accent.
packs.surfaceTreatment: muted warm neutrals, soft radii, abundant whitespace, thin dividers
packs.accessibilityNote: High harmony/low contrast aesthetic — verify functional contrast still passes.

packs.name: Memphis
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre joins a primary clash set; Umber grounds; anchors never dropped.
packs.surfaceTreatment: flat blocks, squiggle decals, offset grids, hard shadows
packs.accessibilityNote: Clashing colour is decorative; keep text on solid high-contrast blocks.

packs.name: Bohemian
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as a warm jewel tone alongside Umber earth.
packs.surfaceTreatment: layered textile textures, patterned dividers, warm jewel accents
packs.accessibilityNote: Script fonts decorative-only; never set UI labels in script.

packs.name: Shabby Chic
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Desaturated Ochre/Umber as faded vintage tints.
packs.surfaceTreatment: distressed surfaces, faded floral motifs, soft pastel washes
packs.accessibilityNote: Distressed textures must not reduce text legibility.

packs.name: Cottagecore
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Warm Ochre as honey/wheat, Umber as soil/wood.
packs.surfaceTreatment: natural textures, floral borders, warm rustic palette
packs.accessibilityNote: Texture is background; keep content surfaces calm and legible.

packs.name: Victorian
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as gilt, Umber as deep ground; period colours as accents.
packs.surfaceTreatment: gilded frames, damask fills, ornate rules
packs.accessibilityNote: Period ornament decorative-only; maintain modern contrast floors.

packs.name: Art Deco
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as the signature gold; Umber as lacquer ground.
packs.surfaceTreatment: symmetric geometry, sunburst motifs, gold hairlines, strong verticals
packs.accessibilityNote: Decorative geometry must not encode meaning; keep contrast on text.

packs.name: Art Nouveau
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre/Umber as the earthy base; whiplash curves as ornament.
packs.surfaceTreatment: flowing curved borders, botanical ornament, earthy panels
packs.accessibilityNote: Hand-lettering decorative-only.

packs.name: Western-Occult
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as desert sun/brass, Umber as leather/night.
packs.surfaceTreatment: leather textures, celestial line motifs, western display serifs
packs.accessibilityNote: Symbolic motifs decorative; ensure UI affordances remain conventional.

packs.name: Kitsch
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre/Umber pushed into deliberately gaudy combos as commentary.
packs.surfaceTreatment: maximalist clutter, glossy plastic fills, retro pastiche
packs.accessibilityNote: Irony is visual; keep accessible structure underneath.

packs.name: Y2K
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as chrome highlight warmth; Umber as deep gradient base.
packs.surfaceTreatment: chrome bevels, iridescent gradients, glossy pills, tech grids
packs.accessibilityNote: Chrome/gloss must keep label contrast; avoid pure-metallic text.

packs.name: Bauhaus
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre stands in for the primary-yellow; Umber for ink/structure.
packs.surfaceTreatment: strict grid, primary geometric blocks, heavy sans, no ornament
packs.accessibilityNote: Excellent base — high contrast, geometric clarity; ideal accessible skin.

packs.name: Brutalism
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Umber as raw concrete, Ochre as a single jarring highlight.
packs.surfaceTreatment: zero radius, thick black borders, exposed structure, system fonts
packs.accessibilityNote: Deliberately raw, but focus rings + 44px targets are non-negotiable.

packs.name: Cybercore
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as terminal-amber glow; Umber as console ground.
packs.surfaceTreatment: dark console surfaces, neon edges, glitch decals, monospace
packs.accessibilityNote: Neon glow decorative; keep text on solid dark, honor reduced-motion for glitch.

packs.name: Synthwave
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre warms the neon sunset; Umber as the night grid base.
packs.surfaceTreatment: sunset gradients, perspective grids, neon glow, chrome display type
packs.accessibilityNote: Glow is decorative; body text on solid scrim; reduced-motion fallback.

packs.name: Vaporwave
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre/Umber appear as warm pastel accents within the lo-fi palette.
packs.surfaceTreatment: pastel gradients, glitch collage, retro-software chrome
packs.accessibilityNote: Collage decorative; keep functional UI on legible surfaces.

packs.name: Pop Art
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as a primary pop hue, Umber as bold outline ink.
packs.surfaceTreatment: halftone dot fills, thick outlines, flat primary blocks
packs.accessibilityNote: Halftone/dots decorative; text on solid fills.

packs.name: Bento UI
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Anchors used straight; Ochre as the single accent block.
packs.surfaceTreatment: modular rounded cards in a varied grid, soft shadows, clear labels
packs.accessibilityNote: Strong, accessible layout pattern; pairs with the default token set.

packs.name: Graffiti
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as a spray highlight, Umber as wall/concrete.
packs.surfaceTreatment: spray-textured surfaces, drip accents, freestyle display type
packs.accessibilityNote: Freestyle type decorative-only; keep UI labels legible.

packs.name: Tenebrism
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as the single spotlight warmth on Umber/near-black.
packs.surfaceTreatment: deep dark ground, single light source, dramatic falloff
packs.accessibilityNote: Dark imagery; ensure any overlaid UI keeps APCA floor.

packs.name: Gothic
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as candle/gild warmth; Umber as stone.
packs.surfaceTreatment: stone surfaces, pointed-arch motifs, deep palette, blackletter display
packs.accessibilityNote: Blackletter decorative-only; never UI body.

packs.name: Pointillism
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre/Umber built from optical dot mixing in imagery.
packs.surfaceTreatment: dot-textured fills, soft optical gradients
packs.accessibilityNote: Texture is imagery; functional surfaces stay solid.

packs.name: Mixed Media
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Anchors unify a heterogeneous collage; Ochre/Umber as the through-line.
packs.surfaceTreatment: layered collage, torn edges, mixed photo+illustration
packs.accessibilityNote: Collage decorative; keep reading surfaces calm.

packs.name: Steampunk
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as brass/copper, Umber as leather/iron.
packs.surfaceTreatment: brass fittings, gear ornament, leather textures, riveted panels
packs.accessibilityNote: Mechanical ornament decorative-only.

packs.name: Kawaii
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as warm pastel, Umber softened for outlines.
packs.surfaceTreatment: very rounded shapes, pastel fills, cute mascots, bouncy motion
packs.accessibilityNote: Pastels can be low-contrast; verify text/control contrast, keep handwriting display-only.

packs.name: Coquette
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre/Umber as warm complements to a soft pink-led accent set.
packs.surfaceTreatment: ribbon and bow motifs, soft serif display, delicate borders
packs.accessibilityNote: Dainty type decorative-only; ensure functional contrast.

packs.name: Surrealism
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Anchors keep brand identity amid surreal imagery.
packs.surfaceTreatment: dreamlike composition, scale play, metaphorical imagery
packs.accessibilityNote: Imagery-led; UI chrome stays conventional and legible.

packs.name: Utilitarian
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Umber as ink, Ochre as caution/marker accent only.
packs.surfaceTreatment: dense functional grid, monospace data, zero ornament, clear labels
packs.accessibilityNote: Function-first; excellent for data-dense, accessible UIs.

packs.name: Mid-Century
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as a mustard mid-century hue; Umber as walnut.
packs.surfaceTreatment: warm retro palette, organic-geometric shapes, clean sans
packs.accessibilityNote: Warm, accessible aesthetic; good general-purpose skin.

packs.name: Scrapbook
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre/Umber as warm paper and tape tones.
packs.surfaceTreatment: layered paper, taped photos, handwritten accents, sticker decals
packs.accessibilityNote: Handwriting/stickers decorative; keep content legible.

packs.name: Frutiger Aero
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as warm gloss highlight; Umber as deep gloss base; aqua as accent.
packs.surfaceTreatment: glossy rounded panels, bubble highlights, soft gradients, nature gloss
packs.accessibilityNote: Gloss is decorative; maintain control contrast and focus visibility.

packs.name: Dark Academia
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as gold/candlelight, Umber as aged leather/ink.
packs.surfaceTreatment: dark scholarly surfaces, gold serif accents, antique etching motifs
packs.accessibilityNote: Dark theme variant; verify gold-on-dark contrast (use Ochre-300/400 range).

packs.name: Light Academia
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as soft sun warmth; Umber as ink on cream.
packs.surfaceTreatment: cream surfaces, classic serif type, linen texture, warm light
packs.accessibilityNote: Naturally light/legible; close to the default warm-light core.

packs.name: Wabi-Sabi
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre/Umber as natural clay and earth; imperfection embraced.
packs.surfaceTreatment: organic asymmetry, matte earthen surfaces, generous negative space
packs.accessibilityNote: Subtle/low-chroma; verify functional contrast on quiet surfaces.

packs.name: Western/Desert
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as desert sun/sand, Umber as leather/earth.
packs.surfaceTreatment: terracotta palette, western display serifs, rugged textures
packs.accessibilityNote: Display serifs decorative; keep UI labels in the system font.

packs.name: Nautical
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as brass, Umber as rope/wood; navy as accent.
packs.surfaceTreatment: navy + cream surfaces, rope/stripe dividers, brass accents
packs.accessibilityNote: Maritime motifs decorative; maintain contrast.

packs.name: Rebus
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Anchors keep brand voice while pictograms carry meaning.
packs.surfaceTreatment: clean layout, pictographic accents, image-word hybrids
packs.accessibilityNote: Never rely on pictogram alone — pair with text for accessibility.

packs.name: Glassmorphism
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre/Umber tint the frosted layers; anchors stay on solid content.
packs.surfaceTreatment: frosted translucent panels, backdrop blur, soft inner light, hairline borders
packs.accessibilityNote: Glass needs an opaque content scrim behind text; honor prefers-reduced-transparency. See Part 21 Liquid Glass.

packs.name: Modular Type
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Type built from Umber on light with Ochre block accents.
packs.surfaceTreatment: letterforms-as-blocks, strict type grid, bold modular composition
packs.accessibilityNote: Display-driven; ensure body copy uses the readable UI font.

packs.name: Neo-Brutalism
packs.anchorMapping: Umber #45210E + Ochre #F4BA17 anchors immutable; Ochre as a loud functional accent on Umber/paper; hard-edged.
packs.surfaceTreatment: thick borders, hard offset shadows, flat bold blocks, near-zero radius, big type
packs.accessibilityNote: Refined brutalism — bold but keeps 44px targets, focus rings, and APCA Lc≥75.
